subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant, Jinab-i-Mirza Ahmad! On that very day when thou didst depart from hence, a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق جناب میرزا احمد در همان روز که شما از اینجا عازم گشتید نامه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
